channel.title: DDLC on Madhav's Site
channel.description: Recent content in DDLC on Madhav's Site

item.title: DDLC End Screen 1
item.description:
Hey,

Ok. So here is what happened so far.

During most of poetry comparisons part, I had chosen to go with the character yuri as my interest. Mainly cus she bad asl.

Now, when Sayori confessed, my choice was to tell her the truth that we were just friends.

After that interaction, yuri had come over to my house to settle the festival preperations, and I noticed the music getting glitchy.
